3104790.name: CoXistence
3104790.description:
Welcome to the world of Alastria.

Included in your purchase is..

The Base Game -

  • Worldtour - Travel the world of Alastria in search of mystery, cards and lore. Alastria is a live world so what happens today might not happen tomorrow, seize the day!

  • PvP - Take the cards earned in singleplayer and put them on the line against other players in PvP Multiplayer in the hopes you win a hidden gem of a card.

  • Fuse System - Do you have cards that seem to glow from time to time? Thats an indicator that it can be used with another card to make a more powerful card. However you need to find out what those cards are.

  • Also Included  "The Fall of Austri DLC" Which include a the tale itself and an audio version of the tale.

Whats it all about?

CoXistence is a tactical card game based on the characters, events and places in the broad and fictional worlds of Alastria, to which the Tales of CoXistence digital graphic novels are set in.

Loosely based on the mechanics of Triple Triad, CoXistence goes in a different direction, with 8 points of attack, a 4x4 board and a randomized playing field every game. Each player has a hand of 6 cards and will play cards one after another on the board, looking to have the higher attack than your opponent.

Embark on the World Tour: Singleplayer Mode in CoXistence

Welcome to Alastria, where every card tells a story and every match shapes your legend. The World Tour singleplayer mode in CoXistence is your gateway to the heart of our game—a journey through epic battles, mysterious lands, and unforgettable characters.

What is World Tour Mode?

World Tour is more than just a singleplayer campaign. It’s an immersive adventure that lets you:

  • Travel through Alastria’s iconic regions—from the enchanted woods of Sutri to the shadowy depths of the Bone Wyrm’s lair.

  • Challenge 100 unique AI opponents, each with their own decks, strategies, and personalities.

  • Uncover deep lore and hidden secrets woven into every match, card, and tale.

1. Lore-Rich Campaign

Every battle in World Tour is a chapter in Alastria’s evolving saga. You’ll encounter legendary heroes, cunning villains, and mysterious factions, each with stories to tell and secrets to reveal. Collect lore fragments, unlock exclusive tales, and piece together the mysteries of the realm.

2. Dynamic Encounters

No two matches are the same! The 4x4 randomized board and ever-changing turn order ensure that every duel is a fresh challenge. Adapt your strategy, experiment with new decks, and master the unique 8-point attack system.

3. Card Collection & Progression

Defeat AI opponents to earn new cards, rare artifacts, and crafting materials. Every victory brings you closer to assembling the ultimate deck. Level up, unlock bonuses, and fuse cards to create powerful new combinations—just remember, balance is key!

4. Secrets & Surprises

Keep your eyes and ears peeled for hidden events, secret bosses, and cryptic clues. The World Tour is packed with surprises for those who love to explore and experiment.

5. Community Integration

Your journey doesn’t end when the singleplayer campaign does. Bring your hard-earned cards into multiplayer battles, participate in community lore contests, and leave your mark on Alastria’s Hall of Fame.

Why Play World Tour?

  • Perfect for newcomers: Learn the ropes, discover the lore, and build your collection at your own pace.

  • Engaging for veterans: Tackle tough AI, hunt for hidden lore, and test out advanced strategies.

  • Essential for completionists: The World Tour is the only way to unlock certain cards, tales, and achievements.

The Blacksmith: Heart of Crafting in CoXistence

In the world of Alastria, true power isn’t just found—it’s forged. Welcome to the Blacksmith, your gateway to crafting, upgrading, and reinventing your deck in CoXistence.

Meet the Blacksmiths

Every region in Alastria boasts its own legendary Blacksmith, each with a unique style and a few secrets up their soot-stained sleeves. Whether you’re seeking the fine craftsmanship of Sutri’s elven smiths or the rugged ingenuity of the mountain forgemasters, these artisans are ready to help you shape your destiny—one card at a time.

The Forge: Where Legends Are Made

Step into the roaring heat of the Forge, where ordinary cards become extraordinary. Here, you can:

  • Fuse cards to create powerful new variants—white, gold, even the mythical red cards

  • Combine artifacts to unlock different Level Cards, the rarest and most potent in the game

  • Upgrade your favorite cards using rare materials and a touch of Blacksmith magic

Every visit to the Forge is a chance to experiment, optimize, and push your strategy to new heights.

The Scrapyard: Nothing Goes to Waste

Don’t let your old or obsolete cards gather dust—bring them to the Scrapyard! Here, you can:

  • Recycle unwanted cards for Currency ocassionally pick up a bonus

  • Purge expired cards from Thanatos’s Guest List before they disappear forever

Turning yesterday’s cards into tomorrow’s legends is all part of the Blacksmith’s creed.

Upgrades: Forge Your Path

With every battle and every scrap, you’ll collect the resources needed to upgrade your arsenal. Upgrades in CoXistence aren’t just about bigger numbers—they’re about  customizing playstyles, and surprising your opponents with fresh tactics.

The Blacksmith’s Promise

Whether you’re a collector, a strategist, or a lore-seeker, the Blacksmith is your ally in Alastria. Forge, upgrade, and recycle your way to victory—your legend is only just beginning.

The Worlds of Alastria and beyond

Alastria - We want to create a community that want to be involved in the creative process, bring forward ideas and expand the worlds of Alastria together. Have community competitions and promotions as well as feedback and recognition for loyalty. Having a healthy base is how anything grows and expands and we want you to be a part of it.

Tales of Alastria

You can't have a huge world and not have a bit of lore about the place, here's a free one purchase of the game you are granted access to the Story Flipbook, Audiobook for the game on launch day!

Alastria has many many secrets and coincidences. You're not paranoid if you're right, someone once said. Who knows how far it goes....?
